original:
He pauses. 

"I trust you weren't hurt too badly? The night of the ball."
translated:
Il fait une pause.

"J'espère que vous n'avez pas ete trop blesse ? La nuit du bal."

original: "You made some enemies that night with your display during the ball, I think."
translated: "Vous vous etes fait quelques ennemis cette nuit-la avec votre demonstration lors du bal, je crois."

original: "You avoided a bit of trouble that night of the ball, I think. Mostly."
translated: "Vous avez évite quelques ennuis cette nuit-la lors du bal, je crois. En grande partie."

option_line: rao_nerieneSelWonD:"And easily. Those brutes did not realize that I had studied the blade."
original: And easily. Those brutes did not realize that I had studied the blade.
translated: Et facilement. Ces brutes n'ont pas realise que j'avais etudie l'épee.

option_line: rao_nerieneSelLostBlade:"It was a shame to lose... for I have studied the blade."
original: It was a shame to lose... for I have studied the blade.
translated: C'était dommage de perdre... car j'ai etudie l'épee.

option_line: rao_nerieneSelLostC:"Just my pride, perhaps. But don't worry, it's more than recovered."
original: Just my pride, perhaps. But don't worry, it's more than recovered.
translated: Juste ma fierte, peut-etre. Mais ne vous inquietez pas, elle s'en est plus que remise.

option_line: rao_nerieneSelLostD:"What matters is I stood to their insults and fought. My honor is intact."
original: What matters is I stood to their insults and fought. My honor is intact.
translated: Ce qui compte, c'est que j'ai tenu tête a leurs insultes et que je me suis battu. Mon honneur est intact.

option_line: rao_nerieneSelWonA:"They chose to make me their enemy long before that night."
original: They chose to make me their enemy long before that night.
translated: Ils ont choisi de faire de moi leur ennemi bien avant cette nuit-la.

option_line: rao_nerieneSelWonC:"Someone had to put those aristocratic bullies in their place."
original: Someone had to put those aristocratic bullies in their place.
translated: Quelqu'un devait remettre ces brutes aristocratiques a leur place.

option_line: rao_nerieneSelLeftA:"I did not go to House Rao to start a brawl, sir."
original: I did not go to House Rao to start a brawl, sir.
translated: Je ne suis pas alle a la Maison Rao pour declencher une bagarre, monsieur.
